notes: Launches to White Screen. Using Proton 3.16-4
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: Changing the Settings file to windowed mode allows the game to run. Random crashing happens a-lot. Got past the misson payback by setting the music to zero in the settings. turning it off helped reduce the crashing for me
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: Using virtual desktop fixes the white screen crashing in the middle, but nothing stops the constant (every 20 minutes for me) crashing. Raising nolimit, using d3d11, disabling Esync will not fix the issue.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: After installing protontricks (directions are here https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks ) and setting it to emulate virtual desktop, and changing the system vm.max_map_count variable to a higher number, it seems to be working. ||| sysctl vm.max_map_count => To check the value ||| sudo sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=655300 => To set it temporarily |||  You can set the value to be permanent, but I'm not sure everyone wants to do that.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: A normal launch results in a white screen followed by the game crashing. This is fixed by setting the prefix to run in a virtual desktop like previous reports have mentioned. My gamepad was totally unresponsive by default, but it worked after I set 'Steam Input Per-game Setting' to 'Forced Off'. I played through enough of the game to get into the open world section. Averaged 55 FPS on low settings and 33 FPS on highest (except for turning down AA and disabling motion blur), all at 1080p.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: The game starts with white screen, but after minimize and maximize, the game works smooth!
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: white screen at startup; minimize didn't work.  Didn't try proton tricks
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: Game is stable and runs smoothly at max settings. There is one issue, however, with a white screen on startup. I worked around this by simply moving to the next workspace and returning back again. This worked for me on Cinnamon DE.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: Works perfectly if you use protontweaks. Enter `protontricks 307690 winecfg` into the terminal, click on the Graphics tab, enable "Emulate a virtual desktop" and set the desktop size to whatever your resolution is (for me it was 1920x1080).
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: The minimize trick works on KDE Plasma but not on Awesome and Icewm, so I had to enable virtual desktop with proton tricks, but other than that it runs smooth.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes:
Need to use winetricks: '/home/steamdir/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/307690/pfx winecfg' 

Click on graphics tab, enable virtual desktop, and set resolution. 

On game launch, there will be a white screen. You need to move the application window to another workspace and back. Past that, runs perfectly. Audio becomes distorted if you max is out, so make sure it's at 80% or so.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: Runs out of the box on Ubuntu MATE 18.04.3 LTS but there is blank white screen when the game starts. To fix it, switch to a different workspace by press Ctrl + Alt + Left arrow key or Right arrow key then switch back to the original workspace. Playable at 4K resolution with a Radeon RX 580 8GB, just set anti-aliasing to Normal and Ambient Occlusion to Normal.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes: I tried running `protontricks 307690 winecfg`, changing the resolution to that of my desktop (in my case 1366x768) without success. The game crash before starting.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition

notes:
As is noted by others, a white screen will show when starting the game. By changing workspace and waiting for the intro logos to pass, then returning back to the game's workspace fixes the problem.

V-sync seems to cause a massive FPS drop. Otherwise, it runs great. I've maxed out graphics at 3440x1440 and the fps stays around 120.
title: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition
